title: Finnish Views on and Engagement in Culture and the Arts 2013
description: The survey conducted in 2013 by the Finnish Cultural Foundation studied Finnish views on and thoughts about culture and its consumption. The respondents were first asked which cultural facilities and events they had visited in the previous 6 months, in the previous 24 months, less often and which facilities and events they had never visited (e.g. theatres, museum, opera, cinema). Obstacles for attending cultural events were charted as well as the importance of different suggested purposes of art
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
